Hero.headline: Your day, quietly planned.
Hero.subhead: Aurela turns your calendar and your to-dos into one simple rhythm — so you always know what’s next, without the mental math.

DayMoments.morningStatement: Start with a plan that already makes sense.
DayMoments.middayStatement: When things change, Aurela adjusts with you.
DayMoments.eveningStatement: Close the day. Tomorrow’s already taking shape.

ClosingStatement.statement: You don’t need a system. You need a rhythm.
